# Master List Framework Engineering & Governance Reference v2.0

## Authoritative Implementation and Governance Sources

This reference is intended for direct inclusion in the Master List Framework Specification v2.0.

The authoritative implementation is `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

The authoritative formatting, worksheet-definition, report-template, header-mapping, sheet-behavior, presentation-standard, and template-governance source is the `Format Dashboard` generated and consumed by the current approved production script.

The generated reference sections below are derived from the current approved production script and the Format Dashboard defaults embedded in that script. They are not recommendations, summaries, or proposed future behavior; they document the implemented v1.6.29 framework surface for specification inclusion.

## Governance Rules

| Governance Area | Rule | Authoritative Source | Enforcement / Consumer |
|---|---|---|---|
| Production implementation | Current approved production script is the executable source of truth. | `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script` | All function inventories, call graph, data flow, validation, wrappers, and runtime paths. |
| Formatting governance | Format Dashboard governs formatting, worksheet definitions, report templates, header mappings, sheet behaviors, presentation standards, system surfaces, and template governance. | `Format Dashboard` defaults and loaders in production script | Template creation, report formatting, Dashboard Quality, validation, and runtime display behavior. |
| Template governance | Report templates are generated from dashboard Section C definitions plus Sections A, B, D, E, and F, with `RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE` as the base foundation. | Format Dashboard + `RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE` | `createOrRefreshAllReportTemplates`, `createOrRefreshTemplateFromDashboard_`, and `validateTemplateFromDashboard_`. |
| Header governance | Header order and source mapping are governed by Format Dashboard Section F and consumed by template builders and report workflows. | Format Dashboard Section F | `loadSheetHeaders_`, `getHeadersForSheetType_`, template builders, report workflows, and validation collectors. |
| Column presentation governance | Width, font-size overrides, date flags, hidden-column flags, wrapping, alignment, and number formats are governed by Section D, with Section A defaults as fallback. | Format Dashboard Sections A and D | `loadColumnDefinitions_`, `applyColumnWidths_`, `applyDateAndNumberFormats_`, `applyHiddenColumnSettings_`. |
| Behavior governance | Title rows, filters, alternating colors, subheaders, template visibility, and output visibility are governed by Section E. | Format Dashboard Section E | `loadSheetBehaviors_`, template build, output visibility policy, Dashboard Quality. |
| Validation governance | Dashboard Quality and framework validation routines document readiness; blocking behavior is defined by each validation routine. | Current approved production script | Validation Catalog and Dashboard Quality workflows. |
| Runtime timing governance | Framework Timing and runtime timing capture execution details, severity, recommendations, and Dashboard Quality performance summaries. | Current approved production script | `runFrameworkTimed_`, runtime timing helpers, Framework Timing Report, Dashboard Quality Section I. |

## SECTION 6 — STATE TRANSITION CATALOG

This section documents production object lifecycles governed by the current approved production script and the Format Dashboard. Each lifecycle is expressed as state transitions. The transition catalog is normative for Master List Framework Specification v2.0 inclusion.

### 6.1 Production Data Object Lifecycle Matrix

| Production Object | Authoritative Initial State | Transition Path | Terminal / Steady State | Owner | Consumer | Validation Gate | Timing Surface | Governance Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Monthly source import tabs | User-imported source worksheets (`B`, `CD`, `UC`, `RD` routes or active source sheets) | Source import → Route identification → Dashboard/template lookup → Formatted monthly report generation | Source either archived/deleted when configured or retained as source evidence | Format Monthly Sheets workflow | Banners, CP Due, Unlock CP, Raw Data reports | Source sheet presence, prompt month/date validation, workflow route checks | Framework Timing and runtime timing | Current approved production script; Format Dashboard Section C/F/D/E |
| Raw Data | Imported Raw Data source tab or active Raw Data worksheet | Source → Raw Data template/canvas → Approved sync columns → Banner-column sync → Primary PMR Row assignment → Raw Data mm.yy report | Governed Raw Data monthly report | Raw Data workflow | Demo P, Master List, Monthly Change, Disenrollment, Dashboard Quality | Raw Data preflight; Primary PMR Row verification; header/date checks | Runtime timing; Framework Timing route timing | Format Dashboard Raw Data definition; Template - Raw Data |
| Banner Report | Imported Banner source tab | Source → Template - Banner Report → Banner output dates → Raw banner copy → Banner Report output | Banners mm.yy report, hidden/visible per output policy | Banner Report workflow | Raw Data banner sync; operators; Dashboard Quality smoke checks | Banner output header validation; template validation | Framework/runtime timing | Format Dashboard Banners definition; Template - Banner Report |
| Care Plan Due Report | Imported CP Due source tab | Source → Template - Care Plan Due → Dashboard source mapping → Report title/date application → Final CP Due output | CP Due mm.yy report | Care Plan Due workflow | Master List care-plan sync diagnostics; operators | Template validation; care-plan sync dependency diagnostics | Framework/runtime timing | Format Dashboard CP Due Date definition; Template - Care Plan Due |
| Unlocked Care Plan Report | Imported Unlock CP source tab | Source → Template - Unlocked Care Plan → Dashboard source mapping → Report title/date application → Final Unlock CP output | Unlock CP mm.yy report | Unlocked Care Plan workflow | Master List care-plan sync diagnostics; operators | Template validation; care-plan sync dependency diagnostics | Framework/runtime timing | Format Dashboard Unlock CP definition; Template - Unlocked Care Plan |
| Demo P | Raw Data monthly report with Primary PMR Row | Raw Data → Demo P template → Primary participant row selection → Contact flattening → Metadata population → Demo P build/update → Active Demo P | Active Demo P production worksheet | Demo P workflow | Master List, Monthly Change, Disenrollment | Raw Data preflight; Primary PMR Row verification; PMR/DOB/header validation | Runtime timing | Format Dashboard Demo P definition; Template - Demo P |
| Synchronization state | Demo P plus formatted Banners/CP Due/Unlock CP reports | Demo P → Changed PMR set → Banner/care-plan/source synchronization → Master List row mutation/update | Synced Master List candidate state | Synchronization workflow | Master List production report; Dashboard Quality diagnostics | Care-plan sync diagnostics; function existence checks; header checks | Runtime timing and Dashboard Quality timing | Current approved production script; Format Dashboard header mappings |
| Master List | Demo P primary rows plus synchronized fields | Demo P → Header-aligned copy → Master List template → Row grouping/sorting → Display formatting → Master List mm.yy | Master List monthly production report | Master List workflow | Monthly Change, Index, operators | Master List Health; header validation; PMR/DOB validation | Runtime timing; Framework Timing summary | Format Dashboard Master List definition; Template - Master List |
| Monthly Change | Current/prior Raw Data, Demo P, and Master List datasets | Current/prior data → Key normalization → Value/date comparison → Section rows → Monthly Change template → Monthly Change mm.yy | Monthly Change report | Monthly Change workflow | Master List update workflow; Disenrollment; operators | PMR/DOB/date key validation; comparison checks; template validation | Runtime timing | Format Dashboard Monthly Change definition; Template - Monthly Change |
| Disenrollment | Raw Data disenrollment state, Demo P active PMRs, Monthly Change removals | Raw Data/Demo P/Monthly Change → Disenrolled PMR sets → Disenrolled Exclusion append/update → Demo P row deletion → Master List removal | Disenrolled Exclusion plus cleaned Demo P/Master List state | Disenrollment workflow | Operators; Dashboard Quality | PMR set validation; row deletion safeguards; header validation | Runtime timing; Framework Timing summary | Format Dashboard Disenrolled Exclusion definition; Template - Disenrolled Exclusion |
| Archive object | Raw source sheet or monthly active/import sheet selected for archive | Source/report sheet → Archive spreadsheet copy → Optional local deletion → Index refresh | Archived external copy plus cleaned workbook state | Archive workflow | Operators; workbook performance | Archive copy success is required before local delete when enabled | Runtime/framework timing | Archive spreadsheet ID; archive flags; current approved production script |
| Index | Workbook sheet collection | Sheet list → Tab metadata extraction → Index row matrix → Index formatting → Trigger-driven refresh on sheet-grid change | Current Index sheet navigation surface | Index workflow | Operators | Trigger path smoke validation; sheet signature property | Trigger/runtime timing | Tab order constants; Index formatting rules |
| Dashboard Quality Report | Dashboard definitions, template results, health/performance rows | Quality shell → Section A-E dashboard verification → Section F template validation → Sections H-N health/performance/signoff → Styled report | Dashboard Quality Report | Dashboard Quality workflow | Operators; release readiness | PASS/WARNING/FAIL rows; health check blocking behavior | Framework Timing; section timestamps | Current approved production script; Format Dashboard; validation catalog |
| Framework Timing Report | Runtime/framework timing events | Timing event → Detail row → Section summary → Performance recommendations → Dashboard Quality Section I | Framework Timing Report | Framework Timing workflow | Dashboard Quality performance summary; maintainers | Timing severity classification and performance summary checks | Runtime/framework timing | Timing section registry and timing helper functions |

### 6.2 Canonical Processing State Transition

```text
Source
↓
Raw Data / Banners / CP Due Date / Unlock CP formatted source reports
↓
Demo P
↓
Synchronization
↓
Master List
↓
Monthly Change
↓
Disenrollment / Disenrolled Exclusion
↓
Archive / Index / Dashboard Quality / Framework Timing
```

| Transition | Required Input State | Transition Function(s) | Output State | Validation | Blocking | Timing |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Source → Formatted source reports | Monthly source tabs or active source sheet exists | `formatMonthlySheets`; `formatMonthlyBannerSheet_`; `formatMonthlyDashboardSheetFromSource_`; `formatMonthlyRawDataSheetFromSource_`; report-specific formatters | Banners, CP Due, Unlock CP, Raw Data reports | Source presence, prompt month/date, dashboard template validation | Yes when required sheet/date/template is missing | Framework/runtime timing |
| Raw Data → Demo P | Raw Data has required headers and Primary PMR Row | `buildDemoPFromScratch`; `updateDemoPMonthlySync`; `processDemoP`; `createActiveDemoPFromRawData_` | Active Demo P | `validateRawDataPreflightForDemoP_`; `verifyPrimaryPMRColumnFromRawData_` | Yes | Runtime timing |
| Demo P → Synchronization | Demo P active data and changed PMR sets exist | `syncMasterListMonthlySourcesIntoData_`; `syncBannerSourceIntoData_`; care-plan sync functions; `copyChangedPMRsFromDemoPToMasterList_` | Synced candidate rows | Header checks; care-plan diagnostics | Caller-dependent; diagnostics produce FAIL rows | Runtime + Dashboard Quality timing |
| Synchronization → Master List | Demo P rows and synced data available | `createMasterList`; `processMasterListFull_`; `processMasterListSingleDataPass_`; `copyPrimaryDemoPRowsToMasterListByHeader_` | Master List monthly report | Master List health; header checks | Yes on header/write failures | Runtime timing |
| Master List → Monthly Change | Current and prior data are available | `buildMonthlyChangeReport`; `buildMonthlyChangeReportForMonth_`; comparison helpers | Monthly Change report | Key/value/date comparison validation | Yes on missing required sheets or write failures | Runtime timing |
| Monthly Change → Disenrollment | Monthly Change removals and Raw Data/Demo P state exist | `createDisenrolledList`; `moveDisenrolledPMRsFromDemoPToExclusion_`; `appendDisenrolledDeltasToExclusionSheet_`; `removeDisenrolledPMRBlocksFromMasterUsingDemoP_` | Disenrolled Exclusion and cleaned active datasets | PMR set validation; row deletion safeguards | Yes on destructive-operation validation failure | Runtime timing |
| Production outputs → Archive/Index/Quality | Reports and system surfaces exist | Archive helpers; `createIndexSheet`; Dashboard Quality runners | Archived copies, Index, Dashboard Quality, Framework Timing | Archive success before delete; trigger smoke; quality sections | Yes for archive-copy failure when local deletion depends on archive | Runtime/framework timing |

### 6.3 Template Lifecycle

```text
Format Dashboard Section C/F/D/E/A/B definitions
↓
RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE foundation
↓
Template sheet create/copy
↓
Full rebuild or metadata-only refresh
↓
Signature storage
↓
Template validation
↓
Hidden/visible governed template state
↓
Report worksheet builder consumption
```

| Template State | Transition | Function(s) | Validation | Blocking | Timing | Governance Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dashboard definition state | Load dashboard globals, title rows, sheet definitions, headers, column definitions, and behaviors | `loadDashboardConfig_`; `loadGlobalSettings_`; `loadSheetDefinitions_`; `loadSheetHeaders_`; `loadColumnDefinitions_`; `loadSheetBehaviors_` | Format Dashboard verification collectors | Yes if dashboard is missing or malformed during build | Framework Timing | Format Dashboard Sections A-F |
| Base template state | Ensure hidden base template exists and has foundation formatting | `ensureGoldenMasterTemplate_` | Downstream staged structure validation | Yes when base cannot be created/copied | Framework Timing | `RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE`; `RFF_DEFAULTS` |
| Template creation state | Copy base or open existing template by dashboard template name | `createOrRefreshTemplateFromDashboard_` | Template existence and expected header count | Yes on missing/uncreatable sheet | Framework Timing | Section C Template Name |
| Refresh decision state | Compare stored signature to expected signature | `buildTemplateFormatSignature_`; `getStoredTemplateFormatSignature_`; `getStoredTemplateFormatSignatureFromSheet_`; `normalizeTemplateFormatSignature_` | Signature match/mismatch controls metadata-only vs full rebuild | No unless signature read/write API fails | Framework Timing | Dashboard-derived format signature |
| Full rebuild state | Resize, clear, format, write metadata/signature, apply freeze/tab/visibility | `buildTemplateFromDashboard_`; `applyTemplateBaseFormatting_`; `writeTemplateMetadata_`; `storeTemplateFormatSignature_`; `applyTemplateFreezeAndTabColor_`; `hideTemplateIfNeeded_` | Template validation and build step exceptions | Yes | Framework Timing | Dashboard Sections A-F |
| Staged build state | Build in temporary sheet, validate minimum structure, promote over existing | `buildTemplateFromDashboardSafely_`; `validateBuiltTemplateMinimumStructure_`; `promoteStagedTemplateBuild_` | Column count, frozen rows, header match | Yes; failed staged validation prevents promotion | Framework Timing | Dashboard Section C/F and globals |
| Metadata-only state | Refresh title/metadata/signature without full rebuild when signature matches | `refreshTemplateMetadataOnly_` | Signature match required | No unless metadata write fails | Framework Timing | Template signature cache flags |
| Validation state | Validate template sheet against dashboard expectations | `validateReportTemplates`; `validateReportTemplatesCore_`; `validateTemplateFromDashboard_` | Missing template, headers, freeze, widths, number formats, filter | FAIL rows block readiness; thrown API errors block execution | Framework Timing / Dashboard Quality | Dashboard Quality Section F |
| Consumption state | Output builders copy/use templates to create production reports | Report-specific builders and formatters | Workflow-specific validation | Yes when builder cannot copy/use template | Runtime/framework timing | Template Inventory and Format Dashboard |

### 6.4 Worksheet Lifecycle

```text
Worksheet absent or source worksheet imported
↓
Worksheet discovered or created
↓
Dashboard/template structure applied
↓
Data written/transformed
↓
Formatting applied
↓
Validation performed
↓
Visibility, sorting, index, archive, or cleanup policy applied
```

| Worksheet Class | Initial State | Transition Path | Final State | Owner | Validation | Timing | Governance Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Source import worksheet | Imported raw/source sheet exists | Prompt/date route → formatter route → optional archive/delete | Formatted output plus optional archived/deleted source | Format Monthly Sheets/report workflow | Source presence and route validation | Framework/runtime timing | Current approved production script |
| Report output worksheet | Template exists and source data exists | Template copy/canvas creation → data write → formatting → visibility policy | Final report worksheet | Report-specific workflow | Template validation; output/header validation | Runtime/framework timing | Format Dashboard Sections C-F |
| Demo P worksheet | Absent or existing active Demo P | Template creation → Raw Data processing → contact flattening → metadata population | Active Demo P worksheet | Demo P workflow | Raw Data preflight; Primary PMR Row verification | Runtime timing | Template - Demo P; Raw Data headers |
| Master List worksheet | Absent or monthly Master List target | Template creation/copy → Demo P row copy → sync fields → sort/display | Master List mm.yy | Master List workflow | Master List health; header validation | Runtime timing | Template - Master List |
| Monthly Change worksheet | Absent or monthly report target | Template creation/copy → compare rows → section formatting | Monthly Change mm.yy | Monthly Change workflow | Key/value/date comparisons; template validation | Runtime timing | Template - Monthly Change |
| Disenrolled Exclusion worksheet | Absent or existing exclusion sheet | Template creation → append disenrolled PMR blocks → formatting | Disenrolled Exclusion | Disenrollment workflow | PMR/header validation | Runtime timing | Template - Disenrolled Exclusion |
| Dashboard Quality worksheet | Missing or stale quality shell | Ensure shell → write changed sections → style updated sections | Dashboard Quality Report | Dashboard Quality workflow | Section status rows | Framework Timing | Dashboard Quality section registry |
| Framework Timing worksheet | Missing or stale timing shell | Ensure shell → append timing details → write summaries/recommendations | Framework Timing Report | Framework Timing workflow | Timing severity/performance summary | Runtime/framework timing | Timing section registry |
| Index worksheet | Missing or stale Index | Build sheet list → write index matrix → apply formatting → trigger refresh | Index | Index workflow | Trigger smoke validation; sheet signature property | Trigger/runtime timing | Tab order constants |
| Template worksheet | Missing, existing, or stale signature | Base copy/open → rebuild/metadata refresh → hide/show policy | Governed report template | Template framework | Template validation; staged minimum validation | Framework Timing | Format Dashboard and RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE |

### 6.5 Dashboard Lifecycle

```text
Dashboard absent or stale
↓
Dashboard rebuilt from script defaults
↓
Dashboard edited by operator if needed
↓
Dashboard saved / cache cleared
↓
Dashboard loaded by framework
↓
Templates, reports, validation, and system surfaces consume dashboard state
↓
Dashboard Quality verifies dashboard sections
```

| Dashboard State | Transition | Function(s) | Output | Validation | Blocking | Timing |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Missing dashboard | Create Format Dashboard from script defaults | `setupReportFormattingDashboard`; `rebuildFormatDashboardDefaults`; `setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_`; `writeDashboardDefaultsFast_` | `Format Dashboard` sheet | Dashboard Quality startup detects existence | Yes for template/report workflows requiring dashboard | Framework Timing |
| Default dashboard | Generated Sections A-G and title row | `writeDashboardDefaultsFast_`; default row providers | Dashboard default config | Format Dashboard verification rows | No if defaults valid | Framework Timing |
| Edited dashboard | Operator edits dashboard cells | `saveActiveLayoutToDashboardSettings`; `saveFormatDashboardConfigChanges_`; snapshot upsert helpers | Updated dashboard config and layout snapshot | Dashboard Quality section verification | Caller-dependent | Framework Timing |
| Loaded dashboard | Framework reads dashboard sections | `loadDashboardConfig_`; section loaders | Dashboard config object | Loader fallback/defaults and section missing errors | Yes if required section missing | Runtime/framework timing by caller |
| Consumed dashboard | Templates/reports/quality consume loaded config | Template builders, report formatters, validation collectors | Templates, reports, validation rows | Template validation; Dashboard Quality | Yes in build/report workflows | Runtime/framework timing |
| Verified dashboard | Dashboard Quality validates dashboard sections | `runDashboardQualityStartUp`; `runDashboardQualityDashboardVerificationSections_`; `collectFormatDashboard*VerificationRows_` | Dashboard Quality Sections A-E/F | PASS/WARNING/FAIL rows | FAIL rows block readiness | Framework Timing |

### 6.6 Validation Lifecycle

```text
Validation target selected
↓
Validation collector or runner executes
↓
PASS / WARNING / FAIL rows generated
↓
Rows saved to Dashboard Quality storage/sheet
↓
Blocking checks throw or Dashboard Quality reports readiness state
↓
Summary/signoff/performance sections consume validation state
```

| Validation State | Transition | Function(s) | Output | Blocking Behavior | Timing | Governance Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Target selection | Dashboard/template/worksheet/framework target chosen | Dashboard Quality runners; workflow validators | Validation inputs | Missing target may produce FAIL or throw | Runtime/framework timing | Validation Catalog |
| Collection | Collector builds validation rows | `collectFormatDashboard*VerificationRows_`; `validateTemplateFromDashboard_`; health and workflow collectors | PASS/WARNING/FAIL rows | Usually non-throwing except blocking validators | Dashboard Quality runtime | Current approved production script |
| Blocking validator | Validator enforces required state immediately | `validateRawDataPreflightForDemoP_`; `verifyPrimaryPMRColumnFromRawData_`; `validateBuiltTemplateMinimumStructure_`; `validateBannerFormatterOutput_`; `runFrameworkHealthCheck` | Return/pass or thrown error | Yes; stops workflow | Runtime/framework timing | Validation Catalog |
| Quality persistence | Rows saved to Dashboard Quality section storage/sheet | `saveDashboardQualitySectionRows_`; `saveDashboardQualityRowsForTemplateValidation_`; `saveDashboardQualityRowsForHealthCheck_` | Stored section rows and styled sheet sections | Save/write errors can block | Framework Timing | Dashboard Quality section registry |
| Summary/signoff | Stored sections rolled into summary/signoff | `buildFrameworkSummaryRows_`; `appendCombinedDashboardSignOffRows_`; `runDashboardQualityFull` | Sections M/N and overall readiness status | Health-check failures can block full workflow | Framework Timing | Dashboard Quality workflow |
| Performance validation | Timing data converted to quality status | `collectDashboardQualityPerformanceSummaryRows_`; `runDashboardQualityPerformanceSummary_` | Section I performance summary | Does not throw for no timing data; statuses indicate risk | Framework Timing | Framework Timing Report |

### 6.7 Timing Lifecycle

```text
Workflow starts
↓
Runtime timing or Framework Timing object created
↓
Steps marked with duration and severity
↓
Timing details written to Framework Timing Report
↓
Dashboard Quality performance summary consumes timing rows
↓
Recommendations and readiness signals are produced
```

| Timing State | Transition | Function(s) | Output | Validation / Severity | Consumer | Governance Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Framework timed workflow start | Create framework timing object | `runFrameworkTimed_`; `startFrameworkTiming_` | Timing object | Timing enabled flag checked | Framework workflows | Framework Timing functions |
| Runtime timed workflow start | Create runtime timing object | `startRuntimeTiming_` | Runtime timing object | Process/month metadata captured | Runtime workflows | Runtime timing helpers |
| Step marking | Mark elapsed step duration and details | `markFrameworkStep_`; `markRuntimeStep_` | Step records with duration/severity | Severity classified by duration/error | Timing report writers | Timing severity rules |
| Error marking | Catch error and write timing before rethrow | `runFrameworkTimed_`; runtime workflow catch blocks | ERROR step and timing details | Critical severity for errors | Operators and Dashboard Quality | Framework Timing report |
| Timing persistence | Write/append detail and summary rows | `writeFrameworkTimingReportBestEffort_`; `appendRuntimeTimingToFrameworkTimingReport_`; `writeCombinedFrameworkTimingReport_`; `writeRuntimeTimingReport_` | Framework Timing Report sections | Best-effort warnings logged on write issues | Dashboard Quality Performance Summary | Framework Timing section registry |
| Performance rollup | Convert timing detail rows to quality rows | `collectDashboardQualityPerformanceSummaryRows_`; `runDashboardQualityPerformanceSummary_` | Dashboard Quality Section I | Slow/bottleneck/critical statuses | Dashboard Quality full workflow | Dashboard Quality Performance Summary |
| Recommendation state | Generate timing recommendations | `writeFrameworkPerformanceRecommendationsSheet_`; `writeFrameworkTimingPerformanceRecommendations` | Performance recommendation rows/report | Recommendation severity from timing detail | Maintainers | Framework Timing workflow |

## Included Reference: Dashboard Inventory

## Dashboard Inventory — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.
Dashboard sheet: `Format Dashboard`. Cell addresses are the default generated locations from `writeDashboardDefaultsFast_()` with a 14-column dashboard width.

## Included Reference: Template Inventory

## Template Inventory — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

Authority: the `Format Dashboard` Section C Sheet Definitions, Section D Column Definitions, Section E Sheet Behaviors, and Section F Sheet Headers are treated as the authoritative template definitions. Implementation verification is against the production script builder, refresh, validation, and output workflows.

### Implementation Verification Summary

| Verification Area | Production Script Evidence | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Dashboard load path | `loadDashboardConfig_` loads globals, title rows, sheet definitions, sheet headers, column definitions, and behaviors before template build. | PASS |
| Template build path | `createOrRefreshAllReportTemplates` sorts dashboard sheet definitions and calls `createOrRefreshTemplateFromDashboard_` for each Section C template. | PASS |
| Template validation path | `validateReportTemplates` / `validateReportTemplatesCore_` validates each dashboard sheet definition with `validateTemplateFromDashboard_`. | PASS |
| Runtime formatting path | Template build applies base formatting, title rows, header rows, data rows, column widths, date/number formats, hidden-column settings, filters, row heights, freeze settings, and tab color from dashboard-derived config. | PASS |
| Protection path | No `protect()` usage was found for report templates; hiding is governed by template visibility and system-sheet functions. | PASS |

Inventory count: 9 templates (8 report templates + 1 framework base template).

## Included Reference: Validation Catalog

## Validation Catalog — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

Scope: validation routines include functions that validate, verify, check required framework surfaces, collect validation/quality rows, or gate readiness through Dashboard Quality, Template Validation, worksheet/header validation, or framework health checks.

| runDashboardQualityStartUp | Dashboard Quality / Format Dashboard | Format Dashboard Validation | None; active spreadsheet | Framework-timed run that creates/ensures Dashboard Quality Report and writes dashboard verification sections | Propagates errors from runFrameworkTimed_ or section collectors | Menu Quick/Quality; runDashboardQualityQuick; quickSystemSetup | Yes when dashboard missing or collector throws | Framework timed | runDashboardQualityDashboardVerificationSections_; runDashboardQualityQuick |
| runDashboardQualityDashboardVerificationSections_ | Dashboard Quality / Format Dashboard | Format Dashboard Validation | timing, optional qualitySheet | Writes/stages Sections A-F dashboard verification rows and returns true or missing-dashboard rows | Missing Format Dashboard writes FAIL row; collector errors become FAIL rows or propagated errors | runDashboardQualityStartUp; verifyFrameworkConfiguration equivalent path | Yes for missing dashboard critical failure | Framework timed when called by runDashboardQualityStartUp | collectFormatDashboard*VerificationRows_ |

| collectFormatDashboardTitleRowsVerificationRows_ | Format Dashboard | Format Dashboard Validation | dashboardSheet or dashboard section index | Rows validating Section B title row records | Missing/blank section, invalid row/target/height/fill level produce FAIL; row 4 non-wrap produces WARNING | collectFormatDashboardGlobalInputVerificationRows_ | No direct throw; FAIL rows block readiness | Dashboard Quality runtime | appendDashboardVerificationPassIfNoIssues_ |

| collectFormatDashboardColumnDefinitionVerificationRows_ | Format Dashboard | Format Dashboard Validation | dashboardSheet or dashboard section index | Rows validating Section D column definitions | Missing/blank section or blank column produces FAIL; duplicates/invalid widths produce WARNING | runDashboardQualityDashboardVerificationSections_; verifyFrameworkConfiguration | No direct throw; FAIL rows block readiness | Dashboard Quality runtime | collectBlankDashboardCells_ |

## Included Reference: Wrapper Inventory

## Wrapper Inventory — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

A wrapper is inventoried when its executable body delegates directly to another named framework function, or when it is a public/menu workflow surface whose implementation is wrapped by the timing harness. Relationship format is shown as `Wrapper ↓ Implementation ↓ Consumer`.

| Wrapper Function | Underlying Function | Purpose | Consumer | Public/Internal | Menu Accessible | Trigger Accessible | Dashboard Accessible | Relationship | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `setupReportFormattingDashboard` | `setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_` | Wrapper-shaped helper that delegates to the canonical implementation. | No direct in-script consumer found; callable as Apps Script function if public. | Public | No | No | Yes | `setupReportFormattingDashboard`<br>↓<br>`setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_`<br>↓<br>No direct in-script consumer found; callable as Apps Script function if public. | Public compatibility or workflow entry point. |
| `rebuildFormatDashboardDefaults` | `setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_` | Wrapper-shaped helper that delegates to the canonical implementation. | quickSystemSetup, formatDashboard, Master List custom menu / ML_MENU_CALLBACKS | Public | Yes | No | Yes | `rebuildFormatDashboardDefaults`<br>↓<br>`setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_`<br>↓<br>quickSystemSetup, formatDashboard, Master List custom menu / ML_MENU_CALLBACKS | Callable from the custom Master List menu. |
| `setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_` | `runFrameworkTimed_` | Public/timed entry point that wraps workflow logic with Framework Timing logging and error capture. | setupReportFormattingDashboard, rebuildFormatDashboardDefaults | Internal | No | No | Yes | `setupReportFormattingDashboardFromScriptDefaults_`<br>↓<br>`runFrameworkTimed_`<br>↓<br>setupReportFormattingDashboard, rebuildFormatDashboardDefaults | Underlying implementation is the callback body passed to runFrameworkTimed_; wrapper is the callable workflow surface. |

## Included Reference: Production Data Flow

## Production Data Flow — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

Scope: traces every production dataset through both processing and formatting flow. The production processing chain is `Source → Demo P → Synchronization → Master List → Monthly Change → Disenrollment → Dashboard Quality`. The production formatting chain is `Format Dashboard → Template → Worksheet Builder → Formatter → Final Report`.

### Processing Flow Overview

```text
Source imports / monthly source tabs
↓
Raw Data + Banners + CP Due Date + Unlock CP formatted source reports
↓
Demo P build/update dataset
↓
Synchronization into Master List and supporting reports
↓
Master List production report
↓
Monthly Change report
↓
Disenrollment / Disenrolled Exclusion dataset
↓
Dashboard Quality / Framework Timing validation surfaces
```

### Formatting Flow Overview

```text
Format Dashboard
↓
Report template definitions and RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE foundation
↓
Worksheet builder / template copy / output sheet creation
↓
Dashboard-governed formatter and workflow-specific formatter
↓
Final report worksheet
```

### Production Processing Data Flow Matrix

| Production Dataset | Source | Processing Step | Implementation / Builder | Owner | Consumer | Validation | Timing | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Monthly import source tabs | User/imported monthly source worksheets (`B`, `CD`, `UC`, `RD` style tabs) | Source acquisition and route selection | `formatMonthlySheets`; route handlers for Banners, CP Due, Unlock CP, Raw Data | Format Monthly Sheets workflow | Monthly formatted reports and Raw Data processing | Source presence checks; active sheet/date prompt validation; route skip logging for missing tabs | `runFrameworkTimed_("Format Monthly Sheets ...")` | Prompt month parts; source tab naming; Format Dashboard definitions; raw monthly source worksheets |
| Banner source / Banner Report | Monthly Banner import source | Source formatting and banner report output | `formatMonthlyBannerSheet_`; `formatBannerReport`; `copyRawBannerDataToOutput_`; `writeBannerReportDates_` | Banner Report workflow | `Banners mm.yy`; Raw Data banner sync; Dashboard Quality smoke checks | `validateBannerFormatterOutput_`; `validateActiveBannerFormatterOutput`; expected Banner headers | Runtime timing / framework timing depending entry point | Template - Banner Report; Section C Banners; Section F Banners headers; Banner source sheet |
| Care Plan Due source / CP Due Date report | Monthly CP Due source tab | Dashboard source mapping and report output | `formatMonthlyDashboardSheetFromSource_`; `formatCarePlanDueReport`; `formatCarePlanDueOrUnlockedFromDashboard_` | Care Plan Due workflow | `CP Due mm.yy`; Master List care plan sync diagnostics | Dashboard template validation; care-plan sync dependency diagnostics | `runFrameworkTimed_` for report formatter; monthly formatting timing | Template - Care Plan Due; Section C CP Due Date; CP Due headers; source date range fields |
| Unlock CP source / Unlocked Care Plan report | Monthly Unlock CP source tab | Dashboard source mapping and report output | `formatMonthlyDashboardSheetFromSource_`; `formatUnlockedCarePlanReport`; `formatCarePlanDueOrUnlockedFromDashboard_` | Unlocked Care Plan workflow | `Unlock CP mm.yy`; Master List care plan sync diagnostics | Dashboard template validation; care-plan sync dependency diagnostics | `runFrameworkTimed_` for report formatter; monthly formatting timing | Template - Unlocked Care Plan; Section C Unlock CP; Unlock CP headers; source date range fields |
| Raw Data formatted report | Monthly Raw Data source tab | Raw Data canvas creation, approved sync columns, banner-column sync | `formatMonthlyRawDataSheetFromSource_`; `formatRawData`; `processRawDataApprovedSyncColumns_`; `syncRawDataBannerColumns_` | Raw Data workflow | Demo P; Monthly Change comparisons; Master List; Disenrollment | `validateRawDataPreflightForDemoP_`; `verifyPrimaryPMRColumnFromRawData_`; header/date validation | Runtime timing for `formatRawData`; framework timing for monthly formatting route | Template - Raw Data; Raw Data Section F headers; Banners output; Primary PMR Row; prompt month |
| Demo P | Raw Data formatted report | Participant/contact flattening, primary-row assignment, metadata population, update/build workflows | `buildDemoPFromScratch`; `updateDemoPMonthlySync`; `processDemoP`; `processDemoPAsWorkingSource_`; `createActiveDemoPFromRawData_`; `updateExistingDemoPFromRawData_` | Demo P production workflow | Master List create/update; Monthly Change comparisons; Disenrollment active-PMR checks | `validateRawDataPreflightForDemoP_`; `verifyPrimaryPMRColumnFromRawData_`; Framework Health required function checks | Runtime timing via `startRuntimeTiming_`, `markRuntimeStep_`, `writeRuntimeTimingReport_` | Template - Demo P; Raw Data; PMR/DOB headers; contact headers; month parts; Format Dashboard column definitions |
| Synchronization dataset | Demo P + formatted monthly source reports | Sync changed PMRs and report-specific columns into active production datasets | `syncMasterListMonthlySourcesIntoData_`; `syncBannerSourceIntoData_`; care-plan sync functions checked by diagnostics; `copyChangedPMRsFromDemoPToMasterList_` | Synchronization workflow | Master List; Dashboard Quality Care Plan Sync Diagnostics | `runDashboardQualityCarePlanSyncDiagnostics_`; header checks; function existence checks | Dashboard Quality timing plus runtime timing in workflows | Demo P; Raw Data; Banners; CP Due; Unlock CP; Master List headers; PMR keys |
| Master List | Demo P primary rows + synchronization data | Master List create/update, row grouping, copy, sort, display, row-height locks | `createMasterList`; `processMasterListFull_`; `processMasterListDataOnly_`; `processMasterListSingleDataPass_`; `copyPrimaryDemoPRowsToMasterListByHeader_`; `sortMasterListByParticipantNameAndPMR_` | Master List production workflow | Monthly Change; Index; Dashboard Quality Master List Health | `runDashboardQualityMasterListHealthCheck_`; header validation; PMR/DOB key validation | Runtime timing for create/update workflow; Framework Timing summary | Template - Master List; Demo P; Raw Data; synchronized Banners/Care Plan data; Format Dashboard columns |
| Monthly Change | Current and prior Raw Data / Demo P / Master List datasets | Change detection, changed-column reporting, section grouping, report generation | `buildMonthlyChangeReport`; `buildMonthlyChangeReportForMonth_`; `getOrBuildMonthlyChangeReport_`; `buildMonthlyChangeSectionRows_`; comparison helpers | Monthly Change production workflow | Master List update workflow; Disenrollment; Dashboard Quality summary | Header/key validation; `valuesAreEqual_`; `isSameDate_`; Dashboard template validation | Runtime timing for monthly change workflow; Framework Timing summary | Template - Monthly Change; current/prior month sheets; Raw Data; Demo P; Master List; PMR/DOB/date keys |
| Disenrollment / Disenrolled Exclusion | Raw Data disenrollment state + Demo P active PMRs + Monthly Change removals | Build and maintain Disenrolled Exclusion, move/delete disenrolled PMR blocks, remove from Master List | `createDisenrolledList`; `splitRawDataRowsIntoActiveAndDisenrolled_`; `moveDisenrolledPMRsFromDemoPToExclusion_`; `appendDisenrolledDeltasToExclusionSheet_`; `removeDisenrolledPMRBlocksFromMasterUsingDemoP_` | Disenrollment workflow | Disenrolled Exclusion sheet; Demo P cleanup; Master List cleanup; Dashboard Quality | PMR set validation; header validation; row deletion safeguards; framework smoke check for delete/buffer behavior | Runtime timing in disenrollment workflow; Framework Timing summary | Template - Disenrolled Exclusion; Raw Data; Demo P; Monthly Change; Master List; PMR headers |
| Dashboard Quality Report | Format Dashboard, templates, Framework Timing, validation result rows | Quality sections A-N, validation summaries, health checks, signoff | `runDashboardQualityStartUp`; `runDashboardQualityValidateTemplates`; `runDashboardQualityFull`; `buildCombinedFrameworkTestDashboard`; `saveDashboardQualitySectionRows_` | Dashboard Quality workflow | Operators; release readiness; Framework Timing; health/signoff summaries | Format Dashboard validation; Template validation; Framework Health; Performance Summary; Master List Health; Care Plan Sync; Workflow Sync | `runFrameworkTimed_`; Dashboard Quality section timestamps; Framework Timing rows | Format Dashboard; template validation results; Framework Timing Report; document properties section storage |
| Framework Timing Report | Runtime/framework timing events | Timing detail, summary, performance recommendations | `runFrameworkTimed_`; `markFrameworkStep_`; `writeFrameworkTimingReportBestEffort_`; `writeCombinedFrameworkTimingReport_`; runtime timing helpers | Framework Timing workflow | Dashboard Quality Performance Summary; maintainers | Timing severity classification; performance summary quality rows | Step timing, total timing, severity, last timestamp | Timing sheet; document properties; Dashboard Quality Section I |
| Index | Workbook sheets and production report tabs | Workbook sheet inventory and navigation | `createIndexSheet`; `generateArchiveFileIndex_`; `handleSpreadsheetChangeForIndex`; `setupIndexRefreshOnSheetAddedTrigger_` | Index / workbook organization workflow | Operators; report navigation | Trigger path smoke validation; sheet signature property | Trigger/runtime timing when called by workflows | Sheet list; tab order constants; on-change trigger; Index template formatting |

### Production Formatting Data Flow Matrix

| Format Dashboard Definition | Template | Worksheet Builder | Formatter | Final Report | Owner | Consumer | Validation | Timing | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

| Disenrollment | Raw Data status, Demo P active rows, Monthly Change removals | Disenrolled Exclusion and cleaned Demo P/Master List rows | Disenrollment workflow | Operators; Dashboard Quality | PMR set validation; row deletion safeguards | Runtime Timing | Template - Disenrolled Exclusion; Raw Data; Demo P; Master List |
| Dashboard Quality | Dashboard definitions, template results, health/performance rows | Dashboard Quality Report sections A-N | Dashboard Quality workflow | Operators; release readiness | Format Dashboard, Template, Framework Health, Performance, Master List, Care Plan, Workflow Sync validations | Framework Timing | Format Dashboard; Framework Timing; validation row stores |

| Final Report | Formatted worksheet | Production-facing report | Workflow owner | Downstream dataset consumers and operators | Dashboard Quality and workflow-specific validations | Framework Timing summary | Workbook tabs; Index; system surfaces |

### Dependency Summary

| Dependency | Used By | Validation / Risk Control | Timing |
|---|---|---|---|
| Format Dashboard Sections A-G | All templates, report formatters, Dashboard Quality | Format Dashboard validation collectors; Dashboard Quality Sections A-E/F | Setup and Dashboard Quality timing |
| RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE | All report templates when missing | Staged template minimum structure validation; template validation | Template refresh timing |
| Template sheets | Worksheet builders and report formatters | Template validation Section F | Template refresh timing |
| Raw Data | Demo P, Monthly Change, Disenrollment, Master List inputs | Raw Data preflight; Primary PMR Row verification | Runtime timing |
| Demo P | Master List, Monthly Change, Disenrollment | PMR/DOB/header validation; Demo P workflow timing | Runtime timing |
| Banners / CP Due / Unlock CP reports | Raw Data sync and Master List sync diagnostics | Banner output validation; care-plan dependency diagnostics | Runtime/framework timing |
| Master List | Monthly Change and operator reporting | Master List Health | Runtime timing and Dashboard Quality |
| Monthly Change | Master List updates and Disenrollment | Change key/value/date comparison; Dashboard Quality workflow | Runtime timing |
| Disenrolled Exclusion | Disenrollment operations and audit trail | PMR set/header validation; row deletion safeguards | Runtime timing |
| Dashboard Quality Report | Release readiness and operational audit | Section status PASS/WARNING/FAIL checks | Framework Timing |
| Framework Timing Report | Performance and bottleneck analysis | Timing severity and performance summary | Runtime/framework timing |
| Index | Operator navigation and workbook organization | Trigger smoke validation; sheet signature refresh | Trigger/runtime timing |

### Exhaustiveness Notes

* Production datasets include source import tabs, formatted source reports, Raw Data, Demo P, synchronization state, Master List, Monthly Change, Disenrolled Exclusion, Dashboard Quality, Framework Timing, and Index.
* Formatting datasets include the Format Dashboard, RFF_BASE_TEMPLATE, report templates, worksheet builders, workflow formatters, final production reports, and system surfaces.
* Validation is cross-referenced to the Validation Catalog and includes blocking validators, quality-row validators, smoke checks, and dependency diagnostics.
* Timing is represented by both runtime workflow timing and Framework Timing / Dashboard Quality timing surfaces.

## Included Reference: Function Call Graph

## Function Call Graph — Master List v1.6.29

Source: `Master_List/Current Production Script/v.1.6.29_Current_Production_Script`.

Scope: generated from all named function declarations in the production script. Calls are limited to calls from one in-script named function to another in-script named function, including named callback references passed to common Array methods. Google Apps Script services, JavaScript built-ins, object methods, anonymous callbacks, and menu string registrations are excluded unless they call or reference a named in-script function inside the function body.

Function count: 682. Edge count: 1744.

Legend: each row presents `Parent ↓ Child ↓ Grandchild`. Child rows have call depth `1`; grandchild rows have call depth `2`. `Recursive` is `Yes` when the parent can reach itself through direct or indirect calls.
